checks.desc: case list page includes the specified columns, default filters, and bulk actions
case detail page exposes the required 10 tabs with the defined data and actions
creating a case generates a case record, a template-driven document checklist, and stage S1
family batch creation creates one case per main applicant and binds required case-party relations
Gate-A/B/C aligned validation and submission flows generate ValidationRun and SubmissionPackage records with correct locking behavior
document handling uses local archive registration with relative path and version metadata instead of SaaS binary storage
billing tab exposes total, receivable, received, outstanding, and payment-record information
visibility and editability follow the administrator, lead, assistant, and finance permission matrix
